description_long: This house is a modern, multi-unit residential building with a flat roof and a mix of white, gray, and red brick facades. The structure features multiple balconies and terraces, some with green patches suggesting small private gardens or patios. Large windows and glass doors are distributed across the exterior, providing ample natural light to the interiors. The building is organized around a central open corridor or walkway, which is accessible from both ends and flanked by individual units. The overall design is geometric and modular, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation. The use of different colored materials and window shapes adds visual interest and breaks up the massing of the structure.
description: A modern, multi-unit house with flat roofs, mixed facades, balconies, and a central open corridor. The design features large windows, geometric forms, and a blend of white, gray, and red brick exteriors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facades with large windows, balconies, and a mix of white, gray, and red brick surfaces.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the central open corridor, private terraces, and minimal window openings on the back units.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying more balconies, a variety of window shapes, and the modular arrangement of the units.
description_view_3: View from the back entrance, focusing on the central walkway, private green patios, and the geometric layout of the building.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with a mix of large and small windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways are recessed with glass doors, minimal steps, and no prominent porch or decorative columns.
